# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: '18' # Specify your Node.js version
        cache: 'npm'       # Enable built-in npm cache for faster restores

    - name: Cache Node.js modules
      id: cache-npm
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: node_modules
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    - name: Install Node.js dependencies
      # Run npm ci only if the cache did not hit
      if: steps.cache-npm.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: npm ci

    - name: Setup Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v5
      with:
        python-version: '3.9' # Specify your Python version

    - name: Create Python Virtual Environment
      run: |
        python -m venv .venv
        # Ensure pip is up-to-date within the venv
        source .venv/bin/activate
        pip install --upgrade pip

    - name: Cache Python Virtual Environment and pip cache
      id: cache-python-venv
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          .venv
          ~/.cache/pip
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-python-

    - name: Install Python dependencies
      # Run pip install only if the cache did not hit
      if: steps.cache-python-venv.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: |
        source .venv/bin/activate
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Cache Custom Configurations and Build Outputs
      id: cache-custom
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          # Replace with your actual config directories/files
          ./config
          ./env_files
          # Replace with your actual build output directory if applicable
          ./dist
          ./build
          # Example for specific environment config files
          ./.env.production
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-custom-config-build-${{ github.ref_name }}-${{ hashFiles('**/config/**', '**/env_files/**', '**/.env.production') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-custom-config-build-${{ github.ref_name }}-
          ${{ runner.os }}-custom-config-build-

    - name: Simulate Build Process (adjust to your project's build command)
      run: |
        echo "Starting project build..."
        # Example: mkdir -p dist build config env_files
        # Example: echo "Build output" > dist/index.html
        # Example: echo "App config" > config/app.yml
        # Example: echo "ENVIRONMENT=production" > .env.production
        
        # Create dummy files/directories to demonstrate caching
        mkdir -p dist build config env_files
        echo "Dummy build output for caching" > dist/app.js
        echo "Dummy development config" > config/dev.yml
        echo "API_KEY=12345" > .env.production

    - name: Run Tests (adjust to your project's test command)
      run: |
        echo "Running tests..."
        # Example: npm test
        # Example: pytest
        echo "All tests passed!"
